Compliance.description: Long-established SA insurer (since 1985), part of TIH, no negative regulatory findings, assumed fully FSCA licensed with clean track record.

Customer Satisfaction.description: Excellent HelloPeter rating 4.47/5 (5555 reviews, 81% 5-star, NPS 33), top rankings despite minor complaints.

Product Value.description: Competitive pricing in line with market, broad product range, value-adds like cashback/legal cover, transparent online quotes.

Innovation.description: Advanced app with AutoSOS crash detection, roadside tracking, self-inspection, claims submission, biometric security, MyPolicy portal. Top 3 insurer.

Customer Support.description: 100% response rate on reviews (avg 0.14h), phone/app support Mon-Sat, dedicated agents praised.

Accessibility & Security.description: Biometric app login, POPIA compliance assumed as FSCA licensed insurer. Secure policy management app.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Industry avg R800-R1400/mo comprehensive; personalized quotes via quote.autogen.co.za

socialSentiment.summary: Strong positive on HelloPeter/Google Play; active brand presence on social with events/promos; minor complaints balanced by high satisfaction.
